assertions.reason: The GEO overlay still surfaced the Bolivia ↔ Guatemala arc, but its SHARED INTEL drilldown now contains only contextually related Semana Santa stories; the previously unrelated Harry Potter/HBO item is gone.
evidence: Browser text inspection of the ArcPanel showed "Bolivia ↔ Guatemala" with SHARED INTEL 8 and titles all focused on Semana Santa-related topics.
Browser-side eval of the rendered active GEO data showed BO-GT sharedCount=8, hasHarryPotter=false, hasHbo=false, and semanaSantaMatches=8.

frictions: The configured user-testing-flow-validator Task could not launch because its model setting is invalid (`custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`), so this rerun was completed manually in the assigned browser session.

Flat-map geopolitical arcs are rendered on the canvas and did not expose reliable hit targets to agent-browser, so the validator used eval-assisted store inspection to select the BO-GT arc and then reviewed the normal rendered ArcPanel.
